overview.description: The iShares 10-20 Year Treasury Bond ETF (TLH) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE US Treasury 10-20 Year Bond index. The fund tracks a market-weighted index of debt issued by the U.S. Treasury TLH was launched on Jan 5, 2007 and is issued by BlackRock.
